positive: A whimsical and enchanting maximalist floral pattern featuring a stylized combination of exotic flora (like giant iridescent lilies, curling jungle vines, and bioluminescent tropical leaves) and subtle celestial elements (crescent moons, shooting stars, and minimalist constellations). The pattern should be arranged in a seamless, repeating tile format. The style should be a blend of Art Nouveau elegance and modern digital graphic illustration, rendered with highly saturated, jewel-toned colors (deep indigo, emerald green, sapphire blue, and pops of iridescent magenta). The composition must be centralized, high contrast, and clean enough for apparel printing, ensuring the pattern reads clearly even at smaller scales. Vector illustration quality, perfect symmetry, detailed linework, highly breathable print quality.
negative: blurry, low detail, artifact, noise, text, watermark, logo, trademark, out of frame, extra limbs, bad anatomy, grayscale, photorealistic, sketch, messy, faded, muddy
